author: @ThinkingandTinkering
text: It was some kind of cheap chinese import - I am afraid I don't knowexactly which one. As long as your top roller fits inside the top electrode it shouldn't matter too much though as your belt doesn't need to be as wide as the rollers. The charge will still accumulate to around 350,000 to 500,000 as the maximum voltage is a function of the top electrode diameter. If the belt is too small it will just take longer to get there.

author: @rhinenio
text: What make of sander was it, the ones ive found have different size rollers
